scripts.dev: pnpm --filter @marketlum/shared run build && pnpm --filter @marketlum/core run build && pnpm --filter @marketlum/ui run build && pnpm --parallel --filter=!@marketlum/shared --filter=!@marketlum/core --filter=!@marketlum/ui -r run dev
scripts.migration:generate: pnpm --filter @marketlum/core run build && pnpm --filter @marketlum/api run migration:generate
scripts.migration:run: pnpm --filter @marketlum/core run build && pnpm --filter @marketlum/api run migration:run
scripts.migration:revert: pnpm --filter @marketlum/core run build && pnpm --filter @marketlum/api run migration:revert
scripts.test:e2e: pnpm --filter @marketlum/shared run build && pnpm --filter @marketlum/core run build && pnpm --filter @marketlum/api run test:e2e
scripts.seed: pnpm --filter @marketlum/core run build && pnpm --filter @marketlum/api run seed
